# Allen Christopher Aduan

> Official portfolio of Allen Christopher Aduan, a software engineer based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

Allen builds production-ready web applications, APIs, payment systems, financial ledgers, and responsive digital products. His primary technologies include Laravel, PHP, PostgreSQL, JavaScript, React.js, and Tailwind CSS.

## Selected work

- [Stripe Payment Operations Platform](https://payments.allenaduan.com/): A Laravel and Stripe platform featuring signed webhooks, asynchronous payment processing, refunds, subscriptions, reconciliation, and double-entry ledger posting.
- [LedgerFlow](https://ledgerflow.allenaduan.com/login/): A Laravel digital wallet and immutable double-entry ledger with atomic transfers, idempotent APIs, audit trails, and reconciliation controls.

## Official profiles
